title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・これが“怪物”よ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap wins the autumn Tenno Sho with a
spectacular performance that has everyone in the
stands on their feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One, now keenly aware of Oguri Cap's
superior skill, burns with a desire to catch up.
